title: Columbus School and College (Essex): warning notice
body: "Notice relating to: Columbus School and College  URN: 138122  Notice issued to: Lift Schools  Reason for issue: ‘Requires significant improvement’ Ofsted judgement  DfE regional director: Jonathan Duff  DfE regional director office: East of England  Local authority: Essex County Council "
